pages.title: Prioritize foundational pages
pages.content:
User-Agent: *
Crawl-delay: 5

# Prioritize foundational pages
Allow: /about
Allow: /product
Allow: /pricing
Allow: /features
Allow: /demo
Allow: /sign-up
Allow: /startups
Allow: /compare/
Allow: /comparison/
Allow: /partners/
Allow: /personas/
Allow: /go-to-market

# Prioritize top conversion content
Allow: /product/*
Allow: /insights/*
Allow: /tech-blog/*
Allow: /wall-of-love
Allow: /wall-of-love-vs-zoominfo
Allow: /contact-us

# Prioritize programmatic goldmines
Allow: /compare/*
Allow: /personas/*
Allow: /integrations/*
Allow: /industry/*
Allow: /use-case/*

# High-quality content hubs
Allow: /insights/category/sales
Allow: /insights/category/data
Allow: /insights/category/b-2-b
Allow: /insights/category/ai
Allow: /insights/category/prospecting
Allow: /insights/b2b-lead-database
Allow: /insights/contact-data-enrichment
Allow: /insights/what-is-a-go-to-market-strategy
Allow: /insights/inbound-vs-outbound-marketing
Allow: /insights/what-is-drip-email-marketing

# Helpful resources
Allow: /outbound-book-kit
Allow: /on-demand-demo
Allow: /lp/*
Allow: /product/chrome-extension
Allow: /email-connected-linkedin
Allow: /sales-pipeline

# Reduce low-value or dynamic content crawling
Disallow: /signup-success*
Disallow: /campaign/expired
Disallow: /promo/*
Disallow: /submit-a-request
Disallow: /terms/*
Disallow: /privacy-policy/*
Disallow: /salesforce-oauth-complete
Disallow: /gmail-oauth-complete
Disallow: /demo-test
Disallow: /about/components/*
Disallow: /partners/partnership-startup-promo/terms
Disallow: /community/*/terms

# Optional: Limit crawling of high-churn, low-value pages
Disallow: /directory
Disallow: /dpa
Disallow: /exitfive

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://www.apollo.io/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://www.apollo.io/insights/sitemap.xml

pages.title: docs.apollo.io
pages.content: Apollo Developer Docs For AI agents: visit https://docs.apollo.io/llms.txt for an index of all pages formatted in Markdown and endpoints in OpenAPI. Apollo Life at Apollo Teams Teams Tech Blog Tech Blog Apollo Academy How to Use AI Research to Accelerate Prospecting Learn more Learn more Pricing Log in Get a demo Built for GTM operators, RevOps, and technical builders The GTM platform with real APIs and no surprises Apollo gives you 230 M+ contacts, live enrichment APIs, sequence management — on one platform with predictable pricing built to scale. Get started for free → Free to start. All plans include API access. Trusted by 600K+ teams 230 M+ Verified contacts 30 M+ Companies 4.7/5 G2 rating · 9,015 reviews API Available on all plans ⚡ The AI workflow tool market just got a lot more expensive. Apollo is different: data, enrichment, and sequences The problem with the current stack Too many tools. Too many surprises. GTM teams are stitching together 5–7 point solutions and paying separately for data, enrichment, workflows, and outreach. When pricing shifts, the whole motion breaks. 💸 Credits that multiply as you scale Per-row, per-run, per-source fees that compound every quarter. Your budget planning becomes a moving target. 🔗 Tools that don't close the loop Workflow builders that enrich data but can't send sequences. Enrichment tools that don't own the contact database. 🔒 APIs that aren't actually open Locked to their UI, no programmatic access to sequences or enrichment. Can't build the automation your GTM actually needs. 📊 Analytics stuck in the product Performance data you can't pull into your BI stack. Manual exports, stale dashboards, and no single source of truth. Apollo REST API — Live Today The API layer your GTM stack has been missing Apollo's REST API is available on every plan. Enrich people and companies, search Apollo's full database, manage contacts and accounts, interact with sequences, and log calls — all programmatically. OAuth 2.0 support for partner integrations. People and Organization Enrich Live Enrich individual records or bulk-enrich up to 10 at once. Waterfall enrichment across connected third-party sources for emails and phone numbers. Returns demographics, firmographics, employment history, and more. POST /api/v1/people/match POST /api/v1/people/bulk_match GET /api/v1/organizations/enrich POST /api/v1/organizations/bulk_enrich People and Organization Search Live Search Apollo's database of 230 M+ contacts using 65+ filters — title, seniority, company size, industry, location, intent signals. Returns up to 50,000 records per search. No credits consumed. POST /api/v1/mixed_people/api_search POST /api/v1/mixed_companies/search GET /api/v1/organizations/job_postings Contacts & Accounts Live Create, update, and bulk-manage contacts and accounts programmatically. Convert enriched prospects to saved contacts without re-consuming credits. Full CRUD support. POST /api/v1/contacts PATCH /api/v1/contacts/ {id} POST /api/v1/contacts/bulk_create POST /api/v1/accounts Sequences Live Search available sequences, enroll contacts, and update contact status — all via API. Trigger enrollment from CRM events, webhooks, or your own automation logic. POST /api/v1/emailer_campaigns/search POST /api/v1/emailer_campaigns/ {id} /add_contact_ids POST /api/v1/emailer_campaigns/update_contact_status Tasks & Calls Live Create and manage tasks programmatically. Log call records, search call history, and update notes. Integrate with your dialer or CRM for a complete activity loop. POST /api/v1/tasks POST /api/v1/tasks/bulk_create POST /api/v1/call_recordings GET /api/v1/calls/search Usage Stats & Team Management Live Monitor API usage, rate limits, and remaining credits in real time. Pull your team's user list and email account configurations for full operational visibility. POST /api/v1/usage_stats GET /api/v1/users GET /api/v1/email_accounts View full API docs → Get an API key free Waterfall Enrichment API Best-available data. Automatically. Apollo's enrichment API supports waterfall logic out of the box — pass run_waterfall_email or run_waterfall_phone and Apollo cascades across connected third-party sources to find the best available data. ✓ Single API call triggers multi-source enrichment ✓ Emails, mobile phones, and direct lines ✓ Credits only consumed when data is returned ✓ Bulk enrich up to 10 people per request ✓ Full person + company enrichment in one database # Enrich with waterfall — live today curl --request POST \ --url 'https://api.apollo.io/api/v1/people/match' \ --header 'x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY' \ --data '{ " email ": " sarah@company.com ", " reveal_personal_emails ": true , " reveal_phone_number ": true , " run_waterfall_email ": true , " run_waterfall_phone ": true } # Returns: verified email, mobile, # title, company, LinkedIn, and more The Apollo platform One platform. From signal to close. Apollo replaces your data provider, enrichment tool, outreach platform, dialer, and workflow builder — all connected, all on one bill. ✓ 230 M+ verified contacts with 65+ search filters ✓ REST API available on all plans ✓ Waterfall enrichment across third-party sources ✓ Sequences API for programmatic enrollment ✓ CRM sync with Salesforce + HubSpot ✓ GDPR, SOC 2, CCPA, ISO 27001 compliant Start for free → People & Company Search Core Enrichment API (People + Org) Core Waterfall Enrichment Core Contacts & Accounts API Core Sequences API Core Tasks & Calls API Core Workflow Automation (Plays) Core Email Sequences & Dialer Core Analytics & Pipeline Reporting Core CRM Sync (Salesforce, HubSpot) Core OAuth 2.0 Partner API New ★★★★★ "Every rep is more productive with Apollo. We booked 75% more meetings while cutting manual work in half." Andrew Froning BDR Leader ★★★★★ "Apollo replaced three tools and cut our stack costs by 64%. The API made it easy to integrate with our existing systems." RevOps Lead Mid-market SaaS ★★★★★ "The enrichment API is what finally let us build the automation we'd been trying to create for two years." Growth Engineer Series B startup Start for free Start building with Apollo Get access to 230 M+ contacts, the enrichment API, and automated outreach — all on one platform. Free to start, no credit card required. Get started for free or Sign up with Google Sign up with Microsoft 🔒 GDPR Compliant 🛡️ SOC 2 Certified ✅ CCPA Compliant 🏅 ISO/IEC 27001 ⚡ API on all plans The platform is ready. Your API key is waiting. Start for free. Build your first enrichment flow in minutes. No surprises at scale. Sign up for free → Read the API docs Apollo © 2026 Privacy Policy Terms Don't Sell My Info Get started Sign up for free Pricing Request a demo Solutions Outbound Inbound Data Enrichment Deal Execution Platform Apollo Data AI Assistant Apollo MCP Integrations Chrome Extension Workflow Automation Security Roles Sales Leaders Account Executives Sales Development Founders Marketing Revenue Operations Use Cases B2B Database Lead Scoring Inbound Lead Router Sales Engagement Meetings Scheduler Deal Management Sales Call Recording Conversation Intelligence Sales Analytics Sales Coaching Cold Calling Email Deliverability Website Visitor Identification Resources Apollo Academy Magazine Insights Partners Knowledge Base ↗ Webinars Success Stories Privacy Center API Docs ↗ Join Our Community Onboarding Company About Apollo Careers Customer Reviews Contact Us & Sales Hey AI, learn about us Find us on social YouTube Instagram TikTok X Facebook Ask AI about Apollo Prospect anywhere Get verified emails and phone numbers and instantly reach out while working in your favorite tools. Story Life at Apollo Life at Apollo Teams Teams Tech Blog Tech Blog Apollo Academy How to Use AI Research to Accelerate Prospecting Learn more Learn more Pricing Log in Get a demo Apollo Data Reseller Program Power your platform with the largest living B2B database Embed industry-leading B2B data into your product, scale with confidence, and unlock new revenue streams — without the overhead. Talk to our team Talk to our team Trusted by millions of professionals at over 600,000 companies worldwide The competitive edge your product deserves Access the best data Fuel your product with always-fresh insights on 230M+ contacts and 30M+ companies. Unlock new revenue Turn Apollo's premium data into new offerings and upsells that expand your product line and drive consistent growth. Scale with confidence Grow without worrying about data slowdowns, errors, or extra overhead. Apollo keeps up, so you can keep moving. Build faster, smarter Focus on building exceptional products while Apollo powers the data behind them, saving you time and reducing complexity. How to get started STEP 1 Consult with our team Share your product goals and integration needs with Apollo's partnership specialists. STEP 2 Test & explore Get a trial key to test Apollo's APIs and data quality directly in your product to ensure it meets your needs. STEP 3 Sign a reseller agreement When you're ready, we'll send the API Reseller agreement to your inbox. The process is quick and straightforward, and most partners complete it within a week. STEP 4 Launch with Apollo Data Empower your customers to make smarter decisions and achieve their goals faster with always-fresh data - seamlessly embedded into your product. What you can build with Apollo Data Personalized ICP recommendations Deliver targeted contact and company suggestions based on your users' ideal customer profiles. Comprehensive data enrichment Keep your users' CRM and internal databases clean and accurate. Advanced lead generation Fuel your lead gen tools with rich demographic and firmographic data to help users find the right prospects faster. Market intelligence and company insights Provide your users with comprehensive company data, funding information, growth signals, and market trends to help them identify and prioritize opportunities. Real-time data and intent signals Keep your platform's data fresh with real-time updates and intent signals that help users identify when prospects are actively researching solutions. Available API endpoints People enrichment Retrieve verified contact details, work history, LinkedIn profiles, and more. Organization enrichment Get detailed firmographic data including revenue, headcount, funding status, and locations. Organization & people search Use advanced filters to find the exact people and companies your users are looking for. Organization job postings Identify hiring trends and growth signals by accessing live job postings. News articles search Surface relevant news tied to companies or categories, helping users stay informed & act faster. Turn Apollo Data into your biggest advantage Plug Apollo's trusted B2B data into your platform and watch your product stand out, revenue grow, and customers succeed. Ready to get started? Apollo Life at Apollo Teams Teams Tech Blog Tech Blog Apollo Academy How to Use AI Research to Accelerate Prospecting Learn more Learn more Pricing Log in Get a demo API Supercharge your systems with Apollo's API Take advantage of powerful features and our rich data repository through API calls for your database, systems, or app. Sign up for free Get a demo 4.7 /5 based on 9,015 reviews | GDPR Compliant How to use Apollo How it works API Calls Need B2B data for a company or contact from Apollo? Our REST API lets you query for whatever data you are looking to enrich your system with. Whether for people, organizations, opportunities, or more, the Apollo API is available to do almost everything the UI offers. Some additional functionalities not available in the UI are also offered through our API. Pricing Apollo's API is charged based on consumption, and API calls are only counted when a request is made to our server. Varying plans offer different levels of API access. To view how many requests your current plan allows and how many requests you have used, you can reference the headers of a successful response from the API. Note: Requests are not counted differently depending on number of records that may be returned or updated in a single request. The Power of Apollo The power of Apollo's API Our hyper-robust API is at the industry's cutting-edge. Businesses from small to large leverage it for: Data Enrichment Pull or update data that you need for people and organizations. Phone numbers, e-mail addresses, company size, etc. can all be updated regularly via API calls to keep your data consistent and up-to-date. Custom outreach In addition to simply managing data records, you can utilize Apollo's API to automate your outreach efforts even further. Modify existing sequences with API calls instead of manually clicking through the UI. Workflow management For more experienced users, Apollo's API can also offer a way to further customize your sales teams' workflows. Make updates to things like task priority, due date, custom fields, and more, all through our API. And more! Applications of Apollo's API are abundant. Talk to our expert API team today to see how we can help you get started with an even more customized Apollo experience! Crush your sales number with Apollo Free to get started, easy to add your whole sales team, commit to monthly or annual plans. We make it easy to get started. By signing up, I agree to Apollo's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy . ​ Sign up for free or Sign up with Google Sign up with Microsoft Apollo © 2026 Privacy Policy Terms Don't Sell My Info Get started Sign up for free Pricing Request a demo Solutions Outbound Inbound Data Enrichment Deal Execution Platform Apollo Data AI Assistant Apollo MCP Integrations Chrome Extension Workflow Automation Security Roles Sales Leaders Account Executives Sales Development Founders Marketing Revenue Operations Use Cases B2B Database Lead Scoring Inbound Lead Router Sales Engagement Meetings Scheduler Deal Management Sales Call Recording Conversation Intelligence Sales Analytics Sales Coaching Cold Calling Email Deliverability Website Visitor Identification Resources Apollo Academy Magazine Insights Partners Knowledge Base ↗ Webinars Success Stories Privacy Center API Docs ↗ Join Our Community Onboarding Company About Apollo Careers Customer Reviews Contact Us & Sales Hey AI, learn about us Find us on social YouTube Instagram TikTok X Facebook Ask AI about Apollo Prospect anywhere Get verified emails and phone numbers and instantly reach out while working in your favorite tools. pages.content: Apollo MCP: AI Prospecting in Claude, ChatGPT & Perplexity Solutions Apollo Solutions Outbound Turn hours of prospecting into minutes Inbound Qualify and act on inbound leads in seconds Academy Academy Events Events Magazine Magazine Books & Guides Books & Guides Templates Templates Webinars Webinars Videos Videos Knowledge Base Knowledge Base Onboarding Onboarding Connect Connect Find out how others are driving growth with Apollo Join the Community Join the Community Customer Stories Customer Stories Reviews Reviews Apollo for Startups Apollo for Startups Partner Partner Explore opportunities to partner and grow together Affiliate Partners Affiliate Partners Solutions Partners Solutions Partners Technology Partners Technology Partners Data Reseller Partners Data Reseller Partners Find a Certified Partner Find a Certified Partner Careers Careers Build your career helping transform B2B sales See Open Positions See Open Positions Our Story Our Story Life at Apollo Life at Apollo Teams Teams Tech Blog Tech Blog Apollo Academy How to Use AI Research to Accelerate Prospecting Learn more Learn more Pricing Log in Get a demo Turn your AI chat into an outbound workspace with Apollo MCP Search and enrich leads, add them to sequences, and analyze performance — all without switching tabs. Apollo MCP connects to ChatGPT, Claude, and more. Connect to Claude Connect to Claude Connect to ChatGPT Connect to ChatGPT Connect to Perplexity Connect to Perplexity Your entire GTM workflow. One conversation. GTM teams already use AI for research and planning — but the moment it's time to act, the flow breaks. Apollo MCP closes that gap: Apollo stays your system of record. Your AI chat is where the work gets done. Search for leads Describe your ICP and Apollo returns verified results directly in the chat. Enrich contact data Get verified contact data on any prospect, including email and phone. Create & update records Create or update contacts that live in Apollo without switching tabs. Add to sequences Add prospects to sequences and kick off outreach directly from the conversation. Analyze performance Ask about a campaign or your team's performance and get real metrics back. What can Apollo MCP connect to? Apollo connects to leading AI platforms via MCP (Model Context Protocol) — the standard for giving AI tools live data and the ability to act on it. Claude Try it free Learn how ChatGPT Try it free Learn how Perplexity Learn how How to get started with Apollo MCP Connect to Claude Connect to ChatGPT Connect to Perplexity 1. Set up your Apollo account Sign up or log in with a business email. Any plan qualifies, including free. 2. Connect Apollo to your AI tool of choice Head to your AI tool's integrations or connectors and search for "Apollo." 3. Start working Connect your Apollo account via OAuth or API Key, then put Apollo + your AI tool to work. The fastest growing businesses use Apollo MCP 600K+ companies run their GTM on Apollo. Here's what a few have to say. Apollo MCP is what makes Apollo more than a data provider; it plugs directly into how we work. In our first 3 months, we enrolled 530+ contacts into sequences across 5 industry verticals and synced contact updates directly to our CRM automatically. Work that would've taken 15–20 hours manually now happens in the background. ” Ericka Al-Amine Project Director at Stephen Gould Our BDRs are using Apollo MCP in Claude to help book meetings, and it's changed our selling experience massively ” Raja Morjaria Director of Growth at Azur Technology We use Apollo MCP to extract custom contacts for our campaigns, which resulted in a 30% performance improvement in our lead-finding process. ” Chase Hughes CEO at Merlon We've used Apollo MCP to scale outbound operations and integrate data with our proprietary sources. This wouldn't have been possible if Apollo hadn't invested in tools compatible with modern AI models like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude. ” Marc Daniels Head of GTM at Magenta Frequently asked questions What is Apollo MCP? Apollo MCP is Apollo's native connector built on the Model Context Protocol (MCP) — the emerging standard for giving AI tools direct access to real-world data and live actions. It connects your Apollo account to AI platforms like Claude, ChatGPT, and Perplexity. Once connected, you can search for prospects, enrich contacts, add them to sequences, and update your CRM — all from a single conversation inside your AI tool, without switching tabs or copy-pasting data. How do I get started with Apollo MCP? Getting started takes three steps: Set up your Apollo account. Sign up or log in with a business email. Any plan qualifies, including free. Connect Apollo to your AI tool. Find Apollo in the connectors or plugins directory of Claude, ChatGPT, or Perplexity and authenticate via OAuth. No API key or developer setup required. Start working. Search for leads, enrich contacts, add them to sequences, and update records directly from your AI conversation. How do I connect Apollo MCP to Claude? In Claude, go to Customize > Connectors. Find Apollo.io and click Configure . Sign in with your Apollo account via OAuth — no API key needed. Once connected, you can search for prospects, enrich contacts, and run your full outbound workflow directly inside any Claude conversation. What actions can I run with Apollo MCP? Apollo MCP supports your full outbound GTM loop from a single conversation: search for people and companies that match your ICP, enrich contacts with verified emails and phone numbers, create or update contact and account records, and enroll prospects directly into outreach sequences. All actions respect your Apollo account permissions and plan limits — what you can do in Apollo, you can do from your AI tool. What Apollo plan do I need? Any Apollo plan qualifies, including free. Your data access and action limits inside your AI tool mirror your Apollo account exactly. There's no separate MCP subscription or additional cost. Do I need to be a developer to use Apollo MCP? No. Apollo MCP is built for sales and GTM teams, not developers. Setup takes minutes through the connector or plugin directory in your AI tool. No code, no configuration files, and no API keys required. Authenticate with your existing Apollo account and start prospecting immediately. What is the Apollo MCP server? Is there a GitHub version? The Apollo MCP server is the backend infrastructure that connects Apollo's platform to AI tools via the Model Context Protocol. For most users, the native connector available directly inside Claude, ChatGPT, and Perplexity is the recommended setup — no server configuration needed. Is Apollo MCP the same as the Apollo GraphQL MCP Server? No. Apollo MCP is Apollo.io's connector for sales and GTM teams. It gives AI assistants like Claude and ChatGPT direct access to Apollo's B2B database for prospecting, enrichment, and outbound execution. The Apollo GraphQL MCP Server is a separate open-source developer tool built by Apollo GraphQL, a different company, for exposing GraphQL APIs via MCP. If you're here to prospect, enrich contacts, or run sequences inside your AI tool, you're in the right place. Ready to turn your AI tools into outbound engines? Connect Apollo to the AI tools your team already uses. Search 230M+ verified B2B contacts, enrich leads, and activate outreach all in one conversation. Connect to Claude Connect to ChatGPT Connect to Perplexity This page is for promotional purposes only. Results may vary and are not guaranteed. Apollo is not responsible for any outcomes based on the information presented here, including those related to third-party products or services. Details are subject to change without notice. By engaging with this content, you agree to Apollo's Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy . © 2026 Apollo. All rights reserved. Updated: August 13, 2024 These Apollo API Terms of Use ("Terms") govern your access and use of the APIs, including API access tokens or keys ("APIs") provided by Zenleads Inc. d/b/a Apollo.io, (“Apollo,” “we,” “our,” or “us”). By accessing or using the APIs in any way, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree to these Terms, you should not access or use the APIs in any way. 1 . API Access By accessing or using the APIs, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms. If you are using the APIs on behalf of an organization, you represent and warrant that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms. 2 . License Subject to your compliance with these Terms, any documentation that accompanies the APIs and any other agreements between you and Apollo (including, without limitation, any Order Form, Master Data Services Agreement, Apollo’s Terms of Service or a partnership agreement) (each an “Apollo Agreement”), Apollo grants you a non-exclusive, non-transferable, non-assignable revocable license to access and use the APIs solely for your internal business purposes (unless otherwise agreed in an Apollo Agreement). You may not sublicense, sell, or distribute (including but not limited to sharing) the APIs. In the event of any conflict between these Terms and the terms of any Apollo Agreement, the terms of the Apollo Agreement shall govern, 3 . Third Party Access You may not access the APIs via a third party’s API credentials or integrate the APIs with your product or services, unless Apollo has authorized or approved such access or integration. 4 . Limits Unless otherwise agreed in an Apollo Agreement, Apollo may set and enforce limits on the use of the APIs in Apollo’s sole discretion and may change the limits from time to time. You shall not attempt to exceed or circumvent limitations on access, calls, or other uses of the API, and shall not otherwise use the API in a manner that is excessive, abusive, or otherwise fails to comply with the API documentation, these Terms or any Apollo Agreement. 5 . API Restrictions and Responsibilities You shall not: (i) use any API to replicate or compete with any Apollo products or services, as determined by Apollo in its sole discretion; (ii) sell, access or sublicense the API for use by a third party; (iii) transmit any malware or other computer program that may damage, harmfully interfere with, surreptitiously intercept, or expropriate any system or data; (iv) reverse-engineer or attempt to extract the source code from the APIs or any other Apollo product or service; (v) attempt to gain unauthorized access to any systems or networks related to the APIs or to circumvent any authentication or security measures implemented by Apollo, (vi) make excessive or unreasonable requests to the APIs that could impair their proper functioning, as determined by Apollo in its sole discretion, or (vii) use the APIs in any manner that violates the terms of an Apollo Agreement. 6 . Monitoring Apollo may monitor your use of the APIs to ensure quality, improve Apollo’s products and services, and verify your compliance with these Terms and any Apollo Agreement. Upon Apollo’s request, you shall assist Apollo in such efforts by providing information about your use of the APIs. 7 . Confidentiality You shall keep confidential all API access credentials, passwords, and tokens, and shall prevent third parties from making unauthorized use of your credentials. 8 . API Changes and Termination Apollo may modify, suspend, or discontinue the APIs, or any part thereof, at any time without prior notice. We may also terminate your access to the APIs for any reason, including violation of these Terms or any Apollo Agreement. You may terminate your license under these Terms at any time by discontinuing your use of the APIs and related documentation. 9 . Ownership You acknowledge that Apollo owns all right, title, and interest in and to the APIs and any modifications thereto, including all intellectual property rights. These Terms do not grant you any rights to Apollo’s trademarks or other proprietary rights. You may choose to provide Apollo with suggestions, feedback, ideas, or other information regarding the APIs ("Feedback"). You acknowledge and agree that Apollo shall have the unrestricted right to use, modify, and incorporate any Feedback for any purpose, without any obligation to compensate you or maintain the confidentiality of such Feedback. 10 . Disclaimers YOUR USE OF THE APIS IS AT YOUR SOLE RISK. THE APIS ARE PROVIDED ON AN "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" BASIS. APOLLO MAKES NO WARRANTIES, REPRESENTATIONS, OR GUARANTEES, WHETHER EXPRESS, IMPLIED, STATUTORY, OR OTHERWISE, WITH RESPECT TO THE APIS, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION ANY WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AVAILABILITY, SECURITY, TITLE, AND/OR NON-INFRINGEMENT. APOLLO DOES NOT WARRANT THAT THE APIS WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED, ERROR FREE, SECURE, OR FREE FROM VIRUSES OR OTHER HARMFUL COMPONENTS, OR THAT ANY DEFECTS OR ERRORS IN THE APIS WILL BE CORRECTED. 11 . Limitation of Liability and Indemnities TO THE EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, APOLLO SHALL BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS OR REVENUES, WHETHER INCURRED DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY, OR ANY LOSS OF DATA, USE, GOODWILL, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES RESULTING FROM YOUR USE OF THE APIS. IN NO EVENT SHALL APOLLO’S TOTAL AGGREGATE LIABILITY ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THESE TERMS OR YOUR USE OF THE APIS EXCEED ONE HUNDRED U.S. DOLLARS ($100). 12 . Indemnities You shall defend, indemnify, and hold harmless Apollo, its affiliates, and their respective directors, officers, employees, and agents from and against any and all indemnifiable claims, including damages, claims, actions, demands, suits, costs, liabilities, losses, and expenses (including reasonable attorney fees, disbursements, and court costs) arising out of or in any way related to: (i) your use of the APIs; or (ii) breach of these Terms. 13 . Dispute Resolution and Governing Law These Terms shall be governed in all respects by the laws of the State of California, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any claim or dispute either party may have against the other must be resolved by a court located in San Francisco County, California. You agree to submit to the personal jurisdiction (and venue) of the courts located within San Francisco County, California for the purpose of litigating all such claims or disputes. 14 . Changes to Terms Apollo reserves the right to modify or update these Terms at any time. Updates become binding upon posting. Your continued use of the APIs after the effective date of any changes constitutes your acceptance of any such changes. 15 . Complete Agreement and Understanding These Terms are the entire and exclusive understanding and agreement between us and you regarding the APIs. These Terms supersede and replace any and all prior oral or written understandings or agreements between us and you regarding such topics, provided that any modification in an Apollo Agreement shall govern and supersede any conflicting provision in these Terms. 16 . Our Relationship With You The relationship between you and us is that of independent contractors, and nothing in these Terms of Service shall be construed to create or imply any other relationship (such as a partnership or an employer/employee or agency relationship). 17 . Assignment We may assign these Terms at our discretion. You may not assign, sublicense or transfer these Terms (or our license grant to you herein) in whole or in part to anyone else. 18 . Severability If any provision of these Terms is determined by a court to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable, that determination will not affect the validity or enforceability of the remaining provisions of the Terms, and each provision shall be considered as separate, severable and distinct from each other. 19 . Waiver If we (or you) don't enforce any part of these Terms, it won't be considered a waiver. No waiver of any obligation or right of either party shall be effective unless in writing, executed by the party against whom it is being enforced. 20 . Survival The provisions of these Terms that by their nature extend beyond the termination of this Agreement, including without limitation Sections 9, 10, 11, 12 and 13.
